items.name: Avocado Bulgogi Bowl
items.description: Impossible "beef", sliced avocado, vegan kimchi, roasted sweet potatoes, sesame kale slaw, green onions, sesame seeds, and a side of our spicy special sauce. Served with a base of your choice and a lemon wedge.

items.name: Chicken and Broccoli Bowl
items.description: Grilled chicken, corn salad, roasted broccoli, roasted sweet potatoes, green onions, sesame seeds, and a side of our Korean BBQ sauce. Served with a base of your choice and a lemon wedge.

items.name: Chili Crunch Chicken Bowl
items.description: 🌶️ Crispy ginger garlic fried chicken, sesame kale slaw, chili pineapple, roasted sweet potatoes, green onions, sesame seeds, chili crunch, and a side of ranch. Served with a base of your choice and a lemon wedge.

items.description: Crispy cauliflower wings, a base of mixed greens, kimchi, corn salad, cucumber salad, vegan ranch dressing, and a lemon wedge.

items.name: Glow Salad
items.description: Carrot labneh spread, marinated cucumbers, radish, pickled onions, spiced roasted sunflower and pumpkin seeds, and pickled golden raisin on organic kale, and romaine blend with saucy vinaigrette.

items.name: Herb Passion Salad
items.description: Herb labneh spread, chickpea salad, radish, spiced roasted sunflower and pumpkin seeds, pickled golden raisin on organic kale and romaine blend with saucy vinaigrette.

items.name: Potato Lover Salad
items.description: Spicy potato spread, pickled beets, marinated feta, radish, spiced roasted sunflower pumpkin seeds, and pickled golden raisin on organic kale and romaine blend with herb labneh dressing.

items.name: Pink Power Salad
items.description: Sumac labneh spread, fennel, roasted veggies, spiced sunflower, and pumpkin seeds on organic kale and romaine blend with saucy vinaigrette.

items.name: Vibrant Salad
items.description: Muhammara (contains almond), pickled beets, marinated feta, fennel, pickled onion, spiced roasted sunflower and pumpkin seeds on organic kale and romaine blend with with sumac vinaigrette.

items.name: Vegan Vibrant Salad
items.description: Muhammara (contains almond), pickled beets, cucumbers, fennel, pickled onion, spiced roasted sunflower and pumpkin seeds on organic kale and romaine blend with with sumac vinaigrette.

items.name: Lentil Mental Salad
items.description: Herb labneh spread, red lentil balls (contains gluten), crispy onion, tabouli (contains gluten), pickled red cabbage on organic kale and romaine blend with saucy vinaigrette.

items.name: FalaFeel Salad
items.description: Herb labneh spread, falafel balls (contains sesame), marinated cucumbers, pickled red cabbage, and onions on organic kale and romaine blend with sumac vinaigrette.

items.name: Vegan FalaFeel Salad
items.description: Muhammara spread (contains almond), falafel balls (contains sesame), marinated cucumbers, pickled red cabbage, and onions on organic kale and romaine blend with sumac vinaigrette.

items.name: Awake Salad
items.description: 🌶️ Spicy potato spread, organic egg, marinated feta, cucumber, pickled onion, pickled apricot, spiced sunflower, and pumpkin seeds on organic kale and romaine blend with herby labneh dressing, includes choice of protein.

items.name: Chicken Stew
items.description: Chicken thigh (halal), mushroom, carrot, potato, celery, green beans, tomato paste, corn starch, paprika, red pepper, black pepper, salt.

items.name: Beef Stew
items.description: Slow-cooked beef stew (halal) with potatoes, carrots, and peas served with rice and choice of tzatziki or arugula salad on the side.

items.name: Okra Stew
items.description: Okra stew with basmati rice, organic arugula fennel salad, and pickled beets.

items.name: Chickpea Stew
items.description: Onion, garlic, tomato paste, bell pepper. Chickpeas, cumin, paprika, black pepper, salt. Tzatziki sauce includes labneh, dill, garlic, dried mint and cucumber.

items.name: Garbanzo Beans Stew
items.description: Chickpea stew (with bell peppers and tomato) served with basmati rice and choice of tzatziki or arugula salad on the side.

items.name: Pasta Bolognese
items.description: Slow cooked grass fed ground beef (halal) bolognese sauce with dried mint, aleppo pepper, parsley and parmesan cheese on bed of garlic confit labneh.

items.name: Herb Meatball Sandwich
items.description: Meatballs, herb labneh spread, chickpeas, radish, sunflower, and pumpkin seeds, pickled golden raisin on organic kale and romaine blend with sumac vinaigrette wrapped in spinach tortilla.

items.name: Glow Chicken Sandwich
items.description: Grilled Chicken (halal), carrot labneh spread, marinated cucumbers, radish, pickled onions, sunflower-pumpkin seeds, pickled golden raisin on organic kale and romaine blend with sumac vinaigrette wrapped in spinach tortilla.

items.name: Meatball Quinoa Bowl
items.description: Meatballs with tzatziki, radish, cherry tomatoes and cucumber served over herbed quinoa. Garnished with fresh dill, Aleppo pepper, parsley, olive oil and mustard vinaigrette.

items.name: Chicken Quinoa Bowl
items.description: Grilled marinated chicken with carrot labneh, radish, cherry tomatoes and cucumber served over herbed quinoa. Garnished with fresh dill, Aleppo pepper, parsley, olive oil and mustard vinaigrette.

items.name: Falafel Quinoa Bowl
items.description: Falafels (contains sesame) with muhammara (contains almond), radish, cherry tomatoes and cucumber served over herbed quinoa. Garnished with fresh dill, Aleppo pepper, parsley, olive oil and mustard vinaigrette.

items.name: Salmon Quinoa Bowl
items.description: Roasted sumac-marinated salmon with pickled beets, radish, cherry tomatoes and cucumber served over herbed quinoa. Garnished with fresh dill and mustard vinaigrette.

sections.name: LunchBoxes
sections.description: Includes a side chips and tomatillo salsa

items.name: The Señor Sisig Burrito
items.description: Your choice of protein wrapped in a flour tortilla with adobo garlic rice, pinto beans, lettuce, pico de gallo and cilantro cream sauce. Includes a side chips and tomatillo salsa.

items.name: California Sisig  Burrito
items.description: Your choice of protein wrapped  in a flour tortilla with french fries inside, shredded cheese, sour cream, guacamole and pico de gallo.  Includes a side chips and tomatillo salsa.

items.name: Tosilog Burrito
items.description: Filipino sweet pork wrapped in a flour tortilla w/ adobo garlic rice, fresh sliced tomatoes & a fried egg.  Includes a side chips and tomatillo salsa

items.name: Sisig Rice Bowl
items.description: Steamed rice topped w/ choice of protein, diced onions, diced jalapeños & achara.  Includes a side chips and tomatillo salsa

items.name: Sisig Salad
items.description: Choice of protein w/ shredded lettuce, pico de gallo, shredded cheese, fried  flour tortilla strips and our calamansi dressing.  Includes a side chips and tomatillo salsa.

items.name: The Señor Sisig Bowl
items.description: Choice of protein w/ adobo garlic rice, pinto beans, lettuce, pico de gallo, and our cilantro cream sauce. (Bowl version of our burrito). Includes a side chips and tomatillo salsa.

items.name: Baked Chicken Leg Quarter
items.description: The Roost's famous ancho-mustard rubbed 38 North chicken, served with a crunchy salsa verde, adobo buttermilk slaw, and jasmine rice.

items.name: Baked Chicken Breast Quarter
items.description: The Roost's famous ancho-mustard rubbed 38 North chicken served with a crunchy salsa verde, adobo buttermilk slaw, and jasmine rice.

items.name: Half Baked Chicken
items.description: The Roost's famous ancho-mustard rubbed 38 North chicken served with a crunchy salsa verde, adobo buttermilk slaw, and jasmine rice.

items.name: BBQ Chicken Sammie
items.description:
Pulled chicken simmered in a house BBQ sauce, served on a soft bun with
adobo slaw, and Sonoma Brinery pickles, with two sweet potato croquettes on
the side.

items.name: Chicken Quinoa Grain Bowl
items.description: Sliced chicken breast over quinoa with chickpeas, red onions, apricots, peppers, and parsley.

items.name: Citrus Braised Pork Bowl
items.description:
Pork shoulder braised with mushrooms, onions and oranges served with mustard
potatoes, collard greens and jasmine rice.

items.name: Grilled Tofu
items.description:
Hodo tofu in a spicy paprika marinade., served with seared shishito peppers,
oranges, and jasmine rice.

items.name: Hodo Tofu Quinoa Bowl
items.description: Grilled tofu over quinoa with chickpeas, red onions, apricots, peppers, and parsley.

items.name: Black Bean & Corn Cakes
items.description: Vegan black bean cakes with corn, peppers, and carrots. Served over a kale salad with red onions, radish, garlic, cauliflower, and a side of preserved lemon vinaigrette.

items.name: Crispy Tofu Spring Mix Salad
items.description: Fried tofu over spring greens with cucumbers, pickled red onions, carrots and a side of shallot vinaigrette.

items.name: Chickpea & Corn Cakes
items.description: Crispy vegan chickpea cakes with corn, peppers and carrots. Served with lemon vinaigrette, kale and garlic cauliflower.
